title: Facial Hair Remover for Women, 2-in-1 Epilator for Women with LED Light USB Rechargeable Portable Electric Epilators Painless Lady Shavers for Face, Lip, Chin, Leg, Arms, Bikini (White)
features: 【Efficient Electric Epilator】The 2-in-1 electric face epilator and face shaver allows for more efficient and faster hair removal compared to the traditional version, perfect for use in removing fine hair on upper lip, chin, cheeks, neck, arms, underarms, legs, legs or private areas, upgraded model with triple powerful electric tweezers to uproot even very short hairs, enjoy a smooth and hairless skin experience!

【COMFORTABLE HAIR REMOVAL EXPERIENCE】Gentle HAIR REMOVAL DEVICE is made of high quality materials to ensure safe use for all skin types. Double your hair removal efficiency. The round shaver consists of a shield around the blades for maximum protection of your skin and a comfortable experience avoiding nicks or redness. If the hairs are too long, you can also use the included long blade to trim them short.

【Built-in LED Light & Easy to Clean】Epilator for women cordless has a built-in LED light that illuminates the skin in low-light environments, allowing for more effective viewing of the hair removal results, which ensures precise hair removal and allows for a more thorough hair removal! The blade head is removable, the included cleaning brush helps to keep the epilator clean and hygienic.

【USB rechargeable】Flawless facial hair remover for women has a built-in 350 mAh battery, which can be used continuously for 60 minutes on a full charge, enough for a short trip or business trip. The rechargeable design saves you the trouble of replacing the battery frequently, use the included USB cable to charge it through power supply, car charger and other USB charging devices. It can be fully charged in 120 minutes at most.

【Fashionable and Portable】The electric lady shavers' lipstick tube-like shape and lightweight size can easily fit into your beauty case or backpack without taking up too much space. Package includes replaceable facial epilator, facial shaver and 3 pieces eyebrow trimmer to cover most of your hair removal scenarios. The exquisite set and stylish look also make it a perfect gift for your mum, sister or wife!
